nasb.text: But He said, “On the contrary, blessed are those who hear the word of God and observe it.”

esv.text: But he said, “Blessed rather are those who hear the word of God and keep it!”

cnv.text: 他說：“是的，卻還不如聽　神的道而遵守的人有福。”

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“但那听了上帝的话又去遵行的人更有福。”

csbs.text: 耶稣说：“那听了神的话语又遵守的人，才真是蒙福的！”
